name: While You’re Away on Military Duties, Your Wife Is Away with Other Men
description:
You'd think being active military would mean your wife couldn't wait to jump your bones whenever you got home, especially with you gone for a month or more at a time. But this past year, she's seemed less excited about your returns and more interested in how long you'll be away.

Jessie's been juggling two affairs. One man walked away, but the other still comes running - fully aware she's married and fully willing to risk getting caught just to keep their illicit relationship alive.
creator: Appalling
